name: adb-plugin-welcome
description: Customizable welcome & goodbye messages with canvas image cards, DMs, and embeds. Supports isolated worker mode.
author: DeadIndian

welcomeChannelId.description: The channel where welcome messages are sent

welcomeMessage.default: Welcome to the server, {user}! You are member #{memberCount}.
welcomeMessage.description: The message sent when a new member joins

goodbyeChannelId.description: The channel where goodbye messages are sent

goodbyeMessage.description: The message sent when a member leaves

dmEnabled.description: Whether to send the welcome message to the user in Direct Messages (DM)

cardEnabled.description: Whether to generate and attach a canvas image card
